USER REQUEST: I want to run a 20% discount promotion on all noodle dishes this Friday.

CONSENSUS REACHED:
P-Agent: A blanket 20% discount on noodle dishes is a profit-killer. The numbers are unequivocal: every dish loses RM 1.90–RM 7.20 per unit, margins drop 3–5 percentage points, and you'd need a 30–33% volume surge just to break even — but with an elasticity of only -1.2, demand won't stretch that far. Recommend rejecting the blanket discount and instead targeting specific dishes or a smaller discount (10–12%).

notifications.message:
🚨 PRICE SPIKE ALERT — Atlantic Salmon Fillet

• Item: Atlantic Salmon Fillet (93ddc07f-4310-4b48-8dda-7b3ed0f18ca3)
• Current stored unit cost: RM 85.00/kg
• Invoice price from current supplier: RM 115.00/kg
• Price spike: +35.3% (exceeds 20% threshold)
• Current stock on hand: 21.5 kg (expiry risk: HIGH)

📊 MARGIN IMPACT ON AFFECTED MENU ITEM:
• Grilled Salmon (RM 42.00) — uses 0.2 kg salmon per serving
  - Old ingredient cost: RM 17.00/serving → Margin: 59.5%
  - New ingredient cost: RM 23.00/serving → Margin: 45.2%
  - Margin erosion: −14.3 percentage points per serving

🔄 RECOMMENDED SUPPLIER SWITCH:
• Best alternative: Oceanic Seafood Supply (c11eda48-accf-4898-893c-2958a3ef8bde)
  - Reliability: 95% | Lead time: 12 days
  - Estimated salmon cost: ~RM 30.64/kg (based on total_cost_rm proxy — actual unit price to be confirmed via price inquiry)
  - If salmon at ~RM 90/kg from Oceanic: margin recovers to ~57.1% (vs 45.2% at RM 115)

⚠️ RISK OF INACTION:
• Accepting RM 115/kg erodes Grilled Salmon margin by 14.3 pts and may require a menu price increase (>15%) to maintain profitability — which itself needs approval.
• With only 21.5 kg in stock and high expiry risk, stock-out is imminent if no reorder is placed.

PROPOSED ACTION:
1. Send price_inquiry to Oceanic Seafood Supply for Atlantic Salmon Fillet (20 kg, target ≤ RM 90/kg, delivery within 7 days)
2. If Oceanic quotes ≤ RM 90/kg → place purchase order for 20 kg
3. If no competitive alternative found → accept 20 kg from current supplier at RM 115/kg as emergency stopgap (RM 2,300 spend)

🚨 CRITICAL: Salmon stock at 0.5kg — less than 4 hours of supply remaining at 3kg/day usage. Expiry risk score 0.95. Inventory shows 21.5kg logged but most is likely unsellable. Additionally, Beef Ribeye, Lamb Chop, Sea Bass, and Parmesan Cheese are at 0kg. Immediate emergency restock of salmon is needed to avoid service disruption. Estimated spend: RM 300-500 for 10-15kg emergency salmon order. Please approve emergency purchase order.

🚨 KITCHEN SURGE — 92% load, 31 pending orders, only 3 staff on hand.

**ACTIONS TAKEN:**
1. KDS set to URGENT — resequencing to prioritize fast-prep items (Salad, Bruschetta, Fries)
2. Flagging 5 menu items for IMMEDIATE removal (zero-stock ingredients):
   - Ribeye Steak (Beef Ribeye = 0)
   - Seabass Aglio Olio (Sea Bass = 0)
   - Lamb Chop with Veg (Lamb Chop = 0)
   - Cheese Platter (Parmesan = 0)
   - Chicken Parmigiana (Parmesan = 0)
3. Rice conservation alert pushed to KDS — recommending noodle/fries upsell

**RISKS IF NO ACTION:**
- Orders for unavailable items will continue to come in → comp meals, bad reviews
- Kitchen will fall further behind → 45+ min wait times
- Rice may deplete within 1-2 hours at current pace

**NEEDED FROM YOU:**
- Approve menu removals (5 items)
- Consider calling in 1-2 additional staff
- Authorize emergency rice restock order
